title: OpenAI releases o3-mini: reasoning model optimized for coding tasks
excerpt: New model shows 60% improvement on HumanEval benchmarks at 40% lower cost than o1.

title: Anthropic paper: Constitutional AI v2 — self-correction without human labels
excerpt: New training approach reduces RLHF dependence. Potential to lower fine-tuning costs significantly.

title: Vercel ships AI SDK 4.0 with streaming structured outputs
excerpt: Simplifies building LLM features in Next.js. Type-safe streaming responses now generally available.

title: HN: 'We replaced our entire analytics stack with DuckDB + Parquet'
excerpt: 347 upvotes. Teams reporting 10x cost reduction vs Snowflake for workloads under 100GB.

title: Google launches Gemini 2.5 Pro with 2M token context window
excerpt: Context window covers full codebases. Multimodal. Priced at $3.50/1M input tokens.

title: GitHub Copilot adds multi-file editing and PR review in VS Code
excerpt: Copilot can now propose changes across multiple files. GA for all paid plans.

title: Ray 3.0 released: unified compute for ML training and serving
excerpt: Significant API simplification. New autoscaling for inference workloads.
